user.title: Connect to Linux Focus Mode
user.description: Enter the connection details for the Focus Mode daemon running on your Linux machine.

webhook.title: Configure Webhooks
webhook.description:
Copy the URL below and paste it into **both** webhook fields of the Linux app (Settings → HA Integration):

`{webhook_url}`

This URL must be reachable from your Linux machine.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Focus Mode daemon. Check host, port, and that the app is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid bearer token. Check the token in the Linux app settings.

abort.already_configured: This Focus Mode instance is already configured.
